'''zotaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hideable|hideable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hideable|hideable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zotaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zotarithi|zotarithi]] || [[word:zotariji|zotariji]] || [[word:zotarishi|zotarishi]] || [[word:zotariki|zotariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zotaruthuthu|zotaruthuthu]] || [[word:zotarujuju|zotarujuju]] || [[word:zotarushushu|zotarushushu]] || [[word:zotarukuku|zotarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zotaruthu|zotaruthu]] || [[word:zotaruju|zotaruju]] || [[word:zotarushu|zotarushu]] || [[word:zotaruku|zotaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zotarufthuf|zotarufthuf]] || [[word:zotarufjuf|zotarufjuf]] || [[word:zotarufshuf|zotarufshuf]] || [[word:zotarufkuf|zotarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zotarethe|zotarethe]] || [[word:zotareje|zotareje]] || [[word:zotareshe|zotareshe]] || [[word:zotareke|zotareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zotarothotho|zotarothotho]] || [[word:zotarojojo|zotarojojo]] || [[word:zotaroshosho|zotaroshosho]] || [[word:zotarokoko|zotarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zotarotho|zotarotho]] || [[word:zotarojo|zotarojo]] || [[word:zotarosho|zotarosho]] || [[word:zotaroko|zotaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zotarofthof|zotarofthof]] || [[word:zotarofjof|zotarofjof]] || [[word:zotarofshof|zotarofshof]] || [[word:zotarofkof|zotarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zotarÃŸfthÃŸf|zotarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zotarÃŸfjÃŸf|zotarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zotarÃŸfshÃŸf|zotarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zotarÃŸfkÃŸf|zotarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zotarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zotarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zotarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zotarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zotarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zotarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zotarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zotarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zotarÃŸfthÃŸf|zotarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zotarÃŸfjÃŸf|zotarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zotarÃŸfshÃŸf|zotarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zotarÃŸfkÃŸf|zotarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zotarÃŸfthÃŸf|zotarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zotarÃŸfjÃŸf|zotarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zotarÃŸfshÃŸf|zotarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zotarÃŸfkÃŸf|zotarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zotarÃḊthÃḊ|zotarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zotarÃḊjÃḊ|zotarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zotarÃḊshÃḊ|zotarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zotarÃḊkÃḊ|zotarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zotarathatha|zotarathatha]] || [[word:zotarajaja|zotarajaja]] || [[word:zotarashasha|zotarashasha]] || [[word:zotarakaka|zotarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zotaratha|zotaratha]] || [[word:zotaraja|zotaraja]] || [[word:zotarasha|zotarasha]] || [[word:zotaraka|zotaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zotarafthaf|zotarafthaf]] || [[word:zotarafjaf|zotarafjaf]] || [[word:zotarafshaf|zotarafshaf]] || [[word:zotarafkaf|zotarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zotarasha|zotarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zotarshÃḋsha|zotarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zotarosha|zotarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zotarmusha|zotarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zotaryasha|zotaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozotarnkshÃḋsha|gozotarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozotarnkrosha|gozotarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozotarnkmusha|gozotarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozotarnkyasha|gozotarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zotatarasha|zotatarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zotatarshÃḋsha|zotatarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zotatarosha|zotatarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zotatarmusha|zotatarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zotataryasha|zotataryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozotatarnkshÃḋsha|gozotatarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozotatarnkrosha|gozotatarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozotatarnkmusha|gozotatarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozotatarnkyasha|gozotatarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zetÃḊrasha|zetÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zetÃḊrshÃḋsha|zetÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zetÃḊrosha|zetÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zetÃḊrmusha|zetÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zetÃḊryasha|zetÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozetÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|gozetÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozetÃḊrnkrosha|gozetÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozetÃḊrnkmusha|gozetÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozetÃḊrnkyasha|gozetÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zotfarasha|zotfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zotfarshÃḋsha|zotfarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zotfarosha|zotfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zotfarmusha|zotfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zotfaryasha|zotfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozotfarnkshÃḋsha|gozotfarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozotfarnkrosha|gozotfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozotfarnkmusha|gozotfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozotfarnkyasha|gozotfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
